constraints.rationale: Advisory spacing only; thermal qualification requires load testing.

C16.rationale: Cost solver placed C16 beside, not inside, decoupling target U2.

C17.rationale: Crystal load capacitor position derived from the crystal reference.

C18.rationale: Crystal load capacitor position derived from the crystal reference.
